reviews.text: None of my previous health professionals would treat me for hormonal imbalances until I met certain artificial limits on lab work alone, so my menopausal symptoms were left untreated.  This office looked at the entire picture, and worked with me to adjust my hormone levels so I could get relief.  And it has been SUCH a relief.  My husband and I really like working with Functional Family Medicine.

reviews.name: places/ChIJSzq9ik90IocRmfS2uHgu4fU/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNVOXU3S193RRAB
reviews.text: My first visit with Camille was wonderful. I was trying to get established with a new practitioner after being underwhelmed by my last doctor. She spent 1hr with me to get to know me and my history. My last practitioner at DaVida spent 5 min with me and said “you’re young and you look healthy, you shouldn’t have anything to worry about” and sent me on my way.... Camille and her staff are friendly and responsive. I send her an email with a concern or request and she responds within an hour or so. Thank you for being amazing!

reviews.name: places/ChIJSzq9ik90IocRmfS2uHgu4fU/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN3aDR1cm1nRRAB
reviews.text: The people at Functional Family Medicine are wonderful. Camille is amazing! I have never had someone who took the time to get to know me and my history. I never feel rushed when I go in and the staff is super friendly. These guys are great.

reviews.name: places/ChIJSzq9ik90IocRmfS2uHgu4fU/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURreXRxMVRREAE
reviews.text: I love FFM. I can get in when I need to, they are very responsive to email and voicemail, they are all very friendly! reviews.text:
Amazing healing experience with Dr. Johnson!
I went though months of terrible and unknown issues with my stomach and digestion.  Alex Johnson was amazing to listen to my symptoms, talk with me about plans, and guide me to my best health yet! With changes to my diet, supplements, and even practice with mindfulness and meditation- Functional Medicine Center of Albuquerque helped me with what western medicine doctors wrote off easily.
Sometimes our bodies need more then a prescription, and I’m forever grateful I was turned onto the right path with functional medicine:)

reviews.name: places/ChIJI2tg6XCgGIcR9wtUrvq3f7w/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT210dVRsSldOR2hNT1RCeGF5MXpNR2xpYjFsSkxVRRAB
reviews.text: I have been seeing Dr. Johnson for three months now and I have felt better in those three months than I have in literally years! He listens to my symptoms, helps get to the root of them and has guided me to better health already.  I highly recommend Dr. Johnson and the Functional Medicine Center Team.

reviews.name: places/ChIJI2tg6XCgGIcR9wtUrvq3f7w/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT25aV1lUbHZWazB6YW1ac09HUjFjbmRVZVZSdlVrRRAB
reviews.text: I've seen various chiropractors in ABQ for many years, and I'm so glad I found Functional Medicine and Dr. Johnson. First, he does gentle adjustments --  no cracking or popping -- instead, chiropractic tools, the Activator and Arthrostim. Second, he also can do myfascial therapy. No other chiropractor, or PT, or massage therapist, has ever done that on me. And it helps so much!

reviews.name: places/ChIJI2tg6XCgGIcR9wtUrvq3f7w/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT25SUVQxZEpXRk00Y1hrM05HaE5UVE4yWTJsbk5FRRAB
reviews.text: I started to see Dr. Johnson back in June for gut issues that I had been dealing with for a long time. I was able to change the way I see food and was given so much information as to how to heal my gut and got down to the root cause of why I was feeling the way I was. The only downfall was how expensive it all was. Overall, satisfied with the outcome!

reviews.name: places/ChIJI2tg6XCgGIcR9wtUrvq3f7w/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VObXYtb2VTMnBTUFZ3EAE
reviews.text: Dr. Johnson seems a pleasant enough person, but I was a bit disappointed in how much more pricey this place is compared to when Doctor Redd was running it. True there is inflation, but it's like four times the price to see Doctor Johnson than it was to see Doctor Redd and there's additionally a 70-dollar fee of your money they hold in case you cancel, which is also off-putting. The lady who answers the phone seems a bit pushy. When I went to Dr. Redd I got the impression he really wanted to help -- and help he did. His wife, who was the former receptionist, was pleasant to deal with also.

Highly recommend Game Day Men’s Health Clinic if you’re looking for a knowledgeable, professional, and supportive team.

reviews.text:
Leaving this review for this wonderful business because my husband isn’t one for doing reviews.

Gameday has changed our lives together! The entire team is incredibly educated and helpful. Eric helped answer all our questions in regards to energy, hair loss, drive, and future fertility in such a way that made my guy not feel any shame but rather a sense of confidence in getting support and answers that are tailored to him. Yari and Jodi always greet him with a smile for his appointments and Ashley and Elise are incredible and knowledgeable when providing services for him. I’ve had the pleasure of meeting Rod too, one of the owners, and let me just say he’s humble and passionate about helping men!

Really grateful for what this team and business has done for us as a couple, so I’m honored to share my perspective and experience from the other side of it all! 10/10 when it comes to easy, no fuss treatments that truly benefit his health and our well being as a team. Thanks Gameday!

reviews.name: places/ChIJS2_jd5R1IocRiUzNpBhdS98/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT25welozaExaRlpQUVRWM1MwUTVWRXRtT0MxbFUwRRAB
reviews.text:
I recently had a vasectomy with Wayne Kuang at MD for Men, and I can't recommend him highly enough! I was quite nervous before my visit, but I was pleasantly surprised by how smooth and quick the entire process was. Wayne took the time to explain everything, which really eased my anxiety.

The procedure itself was surprisingly fast, and the pain afterward was minimal—definitely less than I expected—and it only lasted a couple of days. Overall, my experience was fantastic, and I’m thrilled with the results. If you’re considering a procedure, Wayne is the one to see.

reviews.name: places/ChIJS2_jd5R1IocRiUzNpBhdS98/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT21aelFuUkJRbEZ4TkhKQ2IzUkdja05MV2sxNU4xRRAB
reviews.text: Great experience overall. The office staff was friendly and made everything easy from scheduling to follow-up. Couldn’t have asked for a better experience—highly recommend. Great staff and smooth process

reviews.name: places/ChIJS2_jd5R1IocRiUzNpBhdS98/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2tGM1FqQkpTbWxqVlVWdU5ITktUVEpRWTFwTE5uYxAB
reviews.text: Everyone was super welcoming and hospitable. They made sure I was doing ok and also gave me a note sheet written and electronic to walk me through the timeline of healing and what I should expect.  Dr. Kuang was fast and made sure I was at ease going through the procedure. The procedure was very quick and before I knew it I was done and on my way. Definitely recommend MD for Men if you are thinking of the best place to get a vasectomy.

reviews.name: places/ChIJS2_jd5R1IocRiUzNpBhdS98/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT205MlMweEdZbmh1V0ZCV1ltdFNPV2ROT0hGeVpIYxAB
reviews.text: My wife and I are expecting our first together and decided he’ll be our last. I chose a vasectomy since it’s far less invasive than a tubal ligation. The procedure was quick with minimal discomfort, and I’m fully back to normal about 10 days later. Highly recommend this place to anyone considering a vasectomy.

reviews.text:
I can’t thank Brandy enough for the incredible care and support she’s provided. From the very beginning, she took the time to listen to my concerns and really understand what I was going through. I came to her struggling to lose weight, anxious, depressed and tired all the time. With her help, we developed a personalized plan to manage my hormones and digestive issues, and the results have been truly life-changing.

Thanks to her expertise and compassionate approach, I finally feel like myself again. She’s knowledgeable, patient, and always makes me feel heard. I’m so grateful to have found someone who not only understands the science behind hormone health but also genuinely cares about her patients’ well-being.

Highly recommend to anyone looking for a provider who goes above and beyond!

reviews.name: places/ChIJg-BYYr9zIocRKusLqzBH848/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNEX0tfci1RRRAB
reviews.text: I started seeing Brandi in December. I was exhausted, had no energy, was gaining weight in weird places, had daily migraines and constant aches and pains. I was struggling with depression and feeling completely hopeless. She immediately had me do a Dutch hormones test, then got to work trying to figure out what regimen I needed to be on. I am a 41 year old with premature ovarian insufficiency, and I knew it was going to be complicated. But now three months in, I feel so so much better. I’ve lost weight, my tension headaches are mostly gone, and I am getting my energy back! I’m no longer on an anti depressant, and I’m just taking vitamins specifically tailored to my needs. She never made me feel like my symptoms were made up, or that it was just aging. She also introduced me to dry needling which has been awesome. Brandy will take the time to figure out why you feel so awful and how to get your hormone levels in check. She checks in with me all the time  and because she is both an icu nurse and a functional medicine practitioner, I trust that she sees both sides of the coin. She isn’t going to immediately put me on meds and she is also not anti-pharmaceuticals. It’s truly been amazing how much better I feel.

reviews.name: places/ChIJg-BYYr9zIocRKusLqzBH848/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQ5OGZLMHV3RRAB
reviews.text: Between horrible migraines and MS life is a little rough. Brandy was able to get me in quickly and address my concerns. Left there feeling 100 times better than when I walked in. My migraine I had for days and no medication would touch it, Brandy was able to relieve it in no time. If you are on the fence do it trust me it’s amazing.

reviews.name: places/ChIJg-BYYr9zIocRKusLqzBH848/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNka3Y3c3RnRRAB

If you have chronic pain or an acute pain that nothing else is helping this might be the treatment for you.

reviews.name: places/ChIJx_lFKmA93oYROzcM6aUk7SE/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2tKbmJFTk9XWEoyVURKd1YwRTRZMGxuZVUwMU4wRRAB
reviews.text: We’ve been clients three times (currently) There’s a lengthy intake with both MD online, but then when Dr M enters the room & he’s basically hearing all that info in real time. I will say, there is definitely a wait issue between check-in and the first intake. After that is done you are shown the 100% of actual one to one time asking all the correct questions, reviewing labs, etc. The most important reason that I care about Dr M is because he actually READS all medical records, & is completely aware of why you are there. Both the intake MD (on the computer), & Dr M are both incredible. I am soooo happy that we started with him. Always happy, smiling and has the serious commitment to each & every client. I post this as a mother of a 32, almost 33 yr old who has had since Prader Willi syndrome birth; took us 10 years, but we finally got a Dx through DNA FISH METHYLATION Testing. Dr. M is very open to each client bringing many medical records so that he can review prior to your visit. Overall, this is the Doctor that you WANT to see in LC if you any concerns regarding; anything that’s related to the Pituitary Gland, Hypothalamus, and getting clients on the correct medication. As a 41 yr Registered Nurse (ICU & Pediatrics) with many Board Certifications, , I have struggled with many insurance companies over the years. One of my many certifications is in Utilization Mgmt, Case Mgmt, & after 1.5 yrs, I begged for a transfer back to either NICU, PICU, Peds or adult ICU. No one likes to “fight” insurance all day long, and then change their hats to “Mom” within 5-10 mins. This office is very kind, compassionate & understanding. Probably one of the best in LC!!
